mapper.update:
INSERT INTO SRBA_RISK_ELMT_M ( BAS_YYMM , RSK_CATG1_C , RSK_CATG2_C , RSK_ELMT_C , RSK_ELMT_DTL_CTNT , RSK_CTNT , RSK_VALT_ITEM , RSK_VALT_CAL_STD , EDD_YN , RSK_PNT , INDV_YN , CORP_YN , I_MODEL_YN , B_MODEL_YN , USE_YN , RA_CHG_DT , COMMENT_CTNT , DR_DT , DR_TIME , DR_OP_JKW_NO , CHG_DT , CHG_TIME , CHG_OP_JKW_NO ) SELECT #{COPY_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM , RSK_CATG1_C , RSK_CATG2_C , RSK_ELMT_C , RSK_ELMT_DTL_CTNT , RSK_CTNT , RSK_VALT_ITEM , RSK_VALT_CAL_STD , EDD_YN , RSK_PNT , INDV_YN , CORP_YN , I_MODEL_YN , B_MODEL_YN , USE_YN , RA_CHG_DT , COMMENT_CTNT , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYMMMMDD') , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') , #{DR_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYMMMMDD') , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') , #{DR_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} FROM SRBA_RISK_ELMT_M WHERE 1=1
AND BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM
AND BAS_YYMM = '999912'
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO SRBA_NAT_I (BAS_YYMM,RSK_CATG2_C,RSK_ELMT_C,NTN_CD,NAT_NM,NAT_B_NM,DR_DT,DR_TIME) SELECT #{basYymm} BAS_YYMM , RSK_CATG2_C ,RSK_ELMT_C ,NTN_CD , ( SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE DTL_C = RSK_CATG2_C AND GRP_C = 'S002' ) AS NAT_B_NM ,NAT_NM ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') FROM ( SELECT --R10101 FATF Black list 'R101' RSK_CATG2_C , 'R10101' RSK_ELMT_C , A.RA_ITEM_NTN_CD AS NTN_CD , A.RA_ITEM_NM AS NAT_NM FROM RA_ITEM_NTN A WHERE TRIM(A.FATF_BLACK_LIST_YN) = 'Y' AND A.RA_ITEM_NTN_CD != '-' --국가코드 없는 케이스는 제외
UNION ALL
SELECT --R10102 FATF Grey list 'R101' RSK_CATG2_C , 'R10102' RSK_ELMT_C , A.RA_ITEM_NTN_CD AS NTN_CD , A.RA_ITEM_NM AS NAT_NM FROM RA_ITEM_NTN A WHERE TRIM(A.FATF_GREY_LIST_YN) = 'Y' AND A.RA_ITEM_NTN_CD != '-' --국가코드 없는 케이스는 제외
UNION ALL
SELECT --R10201 FinCEN 조치국가 'R102' RSK_CATG2_C , 'R10201' RSK_ELMT_C , A.RA_ITEM_NTN_CD AS NTN_CD , A.RA_ITEM_NM AS NAT_NM FROM RA_ITEM_NTN A WHERE TRIM(A.FINCEN_LIST_YN) = 'Y' AND A.RA_ITEM_NTN_CD != '-' --국가코드 없는 케이스는 제외
UNION ALL
SELECT --R10301 UN 제재국가 'R103' RSK_CATG2_C , 'R10301' RSK_ELMT_C , A.RA_ITEM_NTN_CD AS NTN_CD , A.RA_ITEM_NM AS NAT_NM FROM RA_ITEM_NTN A WHERE TRIM(A.UN_SANTIONS_YN) = 'Y' AND A.RA_ITEM_NTN_CD != '-' --국가코드 없는 케이스는 제외
UNION ALL
SELECT --R10401 OFAC 제재국가 'R104' RSK_CATG2_C , 'R10401' RSK_ELMT_C , A.RA_ITEM_NTN_CD AS NTN_CD , A.RA_ITEM_NM AS NAT_NM FROM RA_ITEM_NTN A WHERE TRIM(A.OFAC_SANTIONS_YN) = 'Y' AND A.RA_ITEM_NTN_CD != '-' --국가코드 없는 케이스는 제외
UNION ALL
SELECT --R10501 OECD EOIR 등급이 미준수 또는 일부 준수인 국가 'R105' RSK_CATG2_C , 'R10501' RSK_ELMT_C , A.RA_ITEM_NTN_CD AS NTN_CD , A.RA_ITEM_NM AS NAT_NM FROM RA_ITEM_NTN A WHERE TRIM(A.OECD_YN) = 'Y' AND A.RA_ITEM_NTN_CD != '-' --국가코드 없는 케이스는 제외
UNION ALL SELECT --R10601 TI 부패인식지수 'R106' RSK_CATG2_C , 'R10601' RSK_ELMT_C , A.RA_ITEM_NTN_CD AS NTN_CD , A.RA_ITEM_NM AS NAT_NM FROM RA_ITEM_NTN A WHERE A.TICPI_CPI_IDX > 6.67 AND A.RA_ITEM_NTN_CD != '-' --국가코드 없는 케이스는 제외
UNION ALL
SELECT --R10701 INCSR 마약생산유통국가 'R107' RSK_CATG2_C , 'R10701' RSK_ELMT_C , A.RA_ITEM_NTN_CD AS NTN_CD , A.RA_ITEM_NM AS NAT_NM FROM RA_ITEM_NTN A WHERE TRIM(A.INCRS_PROD_YN) = 'Y' AND A.RA_ITEM_NTN_CD != '-' --국가코드 없는 케이스는 제외
UNION ALL
SELECT --R10702 INCSR 마약 밀매 수익금 거래 국가 'R107' RSK_CATG2_C , 'R10702' RSK_ELMT_C , A.RA_ITEM_NTN_CD AS NTN_CD , A.RA_ITEM_NM AS NAT_NM FROM RA_ITEM_NTN A WHERE TRIM(A.INCRS_CHEM_YN) = 'Y' AND A.RA_ITEM_NTN_CD != '-' --국가코드 없는 케이스는 제외
UNION ALL
SELECT --R10801 EU 제재국가 'R108' RSK_CATG2_C , 'R10801' RSK_ELMT_C , A.RA_ITEM_NTN_CD AS NTN_CD , A.RA_ITEM_NM AS NAT_NM FROM RA_ITEM_NTN A WHERE TRIM(A.EU_SANTIONS_YN) = 'Y' AND A.RA_ITEM_NTN_CD != '-' --국가코드 없는 케이스는 제외
UNION ALL
SELECT --R10802 EU 고위험 제3국 'R108' RSK_CATG2_C , 'R10802' RSK_ELMT_C , A.RA_ITEM_NTN_CD AS NTN_CD , A.RA_ITEM_NM AS NAT_NM FROM RA_ITEM_NTN A WHERE TRIM(A.EU_HRT_YN) = 'Y' AND A.RA_ITEM_NTN_CD != '-' --국가코드 없는 케이스는 제외
UNION ALL
SELECT --R10901 Basel 자금세탁위험점수 'R109' RSK_CATG2_C , 'R10901' RSK_ELMT_C , A.RA_ITEM_NTN_CD AS NTN_CD , A.RA_ITEM_NM AS NAT_NM FROM RA_ITEM_NTN A WHERE A.BASEL_RIK_IDX > 6.67 AND A.RA_ITEM_NTN_CD != '-' --국가코드 없는 케이스는 제외
) M

INSERT INTO SRBA_JOB_I (BAS_YYMM,RSK_CATG2_C,RSK_ELMT_C,JOB_C,INDV_YN,CORP_YN,JOB_B_NM,JOB_NM,DR_DT,DR_TIME) SELECT #{basYymm} BAS_YYMM , RSK_CATG2_C , RSK_ELMT_C , JOB_C , INDV_YN , CORP_YN , JOB_B_NM , JOB_NM , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') FROM ( SELECT --R20101 가상자산사업 의심업종 'R201' RSK_CATG2_C , 'R20101' RSK_ELMT_C , A.RA_ITEM_CODE AS JOB_C , '0' AS INDV_YN , '1' AS CORP_YN , ( SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE DTL_C = 'R201' AND GRP_C = 'S002' ) AS JOB_B_NM , A.RA_ITEM_NM AS JOB_NM FROM RA_ITEM_CORJOB A WHERE A.RA_CORJOB_YN8 = 'Y'
UNION ALL
SELECT --R20201 가상자산사업자 'R202' RSK_CATG2_C , 'R20201' RSK_ELMT_C , A.RA_ITEM_CODE AS JOB_C , '1' AS INDV_YN , '0' AS CORP_YN , A.RA_ITEM_IDJOB_NM1 AS JOB_B_NM , A.RA_ITEM_NM AS JOB_NM FROM RA_ITEM_IDJOB A WHERE A.RA_IDJOB_YN7 = 'Y' --가상자산사업 의심
UNION ALL
SELECT --R20601 의료, 제약 관련 산업/직종 'R206' RSK_CATG2_C , 'R20601' RSK_ELMT_C , A.RA_ITEM_CODE AS JOB_C , '1' AS INDV_YN , '0' AS CORP_YN , A.RA_ITEM_IDJOB_NM1 AS JOB_B_NM , A.RA_ITEM_NM AS JOB_NM FROM RA_ITEM_IDJOB A WHERE A.RA_IDJOB_STA_YN2 = 'Y' UNION ALL SELECT --R20601 의료, 제약 관련 산업/직종 'R206' RSK_CATG2_C , 'R20601' RSK_ELMT_C , A.RA_ITEM_CODE AS JOB_C , '0' AS INDV_YN , '1' AS CORP_YN , ( SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE DTL_C = 'R206' AND GRP_C = 'S002' ) AS JOB_B_NM , A.RA_ITEM_NM AS JOB_NM FROM RA_ITEM_CORJOB A WHERE A.RA_CORJOB_STA_YN2 = 'Y'
UNION ALL
SELECT --R20602 건설 산업 'R206' RSK_CATG2_C , 'R20602' RSK_ELMT_C , A.RA_ITEM_CODE AS JOB_C , '0' AS INDV_YN , '1' AS CORP_YN , ( SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE DTL_C = 'R206' AND GRP_C = 'S002' ) AS JOB_B_NM , A.RA_ITEM_NM AS JOB_NM FROM RA_ITEM_CORJOB A WHERE A.RA_CORJOB_STA_YN3 = 'Y'
UNION ALL
SELECT --R20603 무기, 방위산업 'R206' RSK_CATG2_C , 'R20603' RSK_ELMT_C , A.RA_ITEM_CODE AS JOB_C , '1' AS INDV_YN , '0' AS CORP_YN , A.RA_ITEM_IDJOB_NM1 AS JOB_B_NM , A.RA_ITEM_NM AS JOB_NM FROM RA_ITEM_IDJOB A WHERE A.RA_IDJOB_STA_YN4 = 'Y' UNION ALL SELECT --R20603 무기, 방위산업 'R206' RSK_CATG2_C , 'R20603' RSK_ELMT_C , A.RA_ITEM_CODE AS JOB_C , '0' AS INDV_YN , '1' AS CORP_YN , ( SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE DTL_C = 'R206' AND GRP_C = 'S002' ) AS JOB_B_NM , A.RA_ITEM_NM AS JOB_NM FROM RA_ITEM_CORJOB A WHERE A.RA_CORJOB_STA_YN4 = 'Y'
UNION ALL
SELECT --R20604 채광, 금속, 고물상 'R206' RSK_CATG2_C , 'R20604' RSK_ELMT_C , A.RA_ITEM_CODE AS JOB_C , '1' AS INDV_YN , '0' AS CORP_YN , A.RA_ITEM_IDJOB_NM1 AS JOB_B_NM , A.RA_ITEM_NM AS JOB_NM FROM RA_ITEM_IDJOB A WHERE A.RA_IDJOB_STA_YN5 = 'Y' UNION ALL SELECT --R20604 채광, 금속, 고물상 'R206' RSK_CATG2_C , 'R20604' RSK_ELMT_C , A.RA_ITEM_CODE AS JOB_C , '0' AS INDV_YN , '1' AS CORP_YN , ( SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE DTL_C = 'R206' AND GRP_C = 'S002' ) AS JOB_B_NM , A.RA_ITEM_NM AS JOB_NM FROM RA_ITEM_CORJOB A WHERE A.RA_CORJOB_STA_YN5 = 'Y'
UNION ALL
SELECT --R20701 법률, 회계, 세무 관련 산업/직종 'R207' RSK_CATG2_C , 'R20701' RSK_ELMT_C , A.RA_ITEM_CODE AS JOB_C , '1' AS INDV_YN , '0' AS CORP_YN , A.RA_ITEM_IDJOB_NM1 AS JOB_B_NM , A.RA_ITEM_NM AS JOB_NM FROM RA_ITEM_IDJOB A WHERE A.RA_IDJOB_YN1 = 'Y' UNION ALL SELECT --R20701 법률, 회계, 세무 관련 산업/직종 'R207' RSK_CATG2_C , 'R20701' RSK_ELMT_C , A.RA_ITEM_CODE AS JOB_C , '0' AS INDV_YN , '1' AS CORP_YN , ( SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE DTL_C = 'R207' AND GRP_C = 'S002' ) AS JOB_B_NM , A.RA_ITEM_NM AS JOB_NM FROM RA_ITEM_CORJOB A WHERE A.RA_CORJOB_YN1 = 'Y'
UNION ALL
SELECT --R20702 투자자문 관련 산업/직종 'R207' RSK_CATG2_C , 'R20702' RSK_ELMT_C , A.RA_ITEM_CODE AS JOB_C , '1' AS INDV_YN , '0' AS CORP_YN , A.RA_ITEM_IDJOB_NM1 AS JOB_B_NM , A.RA_ITEM_NM AS JOB_NM FROM RA_ITEM_IDJOB A WHERE A.RA_IDJOB_YN2 = 'Y' UNION ALL SELECT --R20702 투자자문 관련 산업/직종 'R207' RSK_CATG2_C , 'R20702' RSK_ELMT_C , A.RA_ITEM_CODE AS JOB_C , '0' AS INDV_YN , '1' AS CORP_YN , ( SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE DTL_C = 'R207' AND GRP_C = 'S002' ) AS JOB_B_NM , A.RA_ITEM_NM AS JOB_NM FROM RA_ITEM_CORJOB A WHERE A.RA_CORJOB_YN2 = 'Y'
UNION ALL
SELECT --R20703 부동산 관련 산업/직종 'R207' RSK_CATG2_C , 'R20703' RSK_ELMT_C , A.RA_ITEM_CODE AS JOB_C , '0' AS INDV_YN , '1' AS CORP_YN , ( SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE DTL_C = 'R207' AND GRP_C = 'S002' ) AS JOB_B_NM , A.RA_ITEM_NM AS JOB_NM FROM RA_ITEM_CORJOB A WHERE A.RA_CORJOB_YN3 = 'Y'
UNION ALL
SELECT --R21001 무직자 'R210' RSK_CATG2_C , 'R21001' RSK_ELMT_C , A.RA_ITEM_CODE AS JOB_C , '1' AS INDV_YN , '0' AS CORP_YN , A.RA_ITEM_IDJOB_NM1 AS JOB_B_NM , A.RA_ITEM_NM AS JOB_NM FROM RA_ITEM_IDJOB A WHERE A.RA_IDJOB_STA_YN6 = 'Y'
UNION ALL
SELECT --R21401 오락, 도박, 스포츠 관련 산업/직종 'R214' RSK_CATG2_C , 'R21401' RSK_ELMT_C , A.RA_ITEM_CODE AS JOB_C , '1' AS INDV_YN , '0' AS CORP_YN , A.RA_ITEM_IDJOB_NM1 AS JOB_B_NM , A.RA_ITEM_NM AS JOB_NM FROM RA_ITEM_IDJOB A WHERE A.RA_IDJOB_YN4 = 'Y' UNION ALL SELECT --R21401 오락, 도박, 스포츠 관련 산업/직종 'R214' RSK_CATG2_C , 'R21401' RSK_ELMT_C , A.RA_ITEM_CODE AS JOB_C , '0' AS INDV_YN , '1' AS CORP_YN , ( SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE DTL_C = 'R214' AND GRP_C = 'S002' ) AS JOB_B_NM , A.RA_ITEM_NM AS JOB_NM FROM RA_ITEM_CORJOB A WHERE A.RA_CORJOB_YN4 = 'Y'
UNION ALL
SELECT --R21402 카지노 'R214' RSK_CATG2_C , 'R21402' RSK_ELMT_C , A.RA_ITEM_CODE AS JOB_C , '0' AS INDV_YN , '1' AS CORP_YN , ( SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE DTL_C = 'R214' AND GRP_C = 'S002' ) AS JOB_B_NM , A.RA_ITEM_NM AS JOB_NM FROM RA_ITEM_CORJOB A WHERE A.RA_CORJOB_YN5 = 'Y'
UNION ALL
SELECT --R21403 대부업자, 환전상, 소액해외송급업자 'R214' RSK_CATG2_C , 'R21403' RSK_ELMT_C , A.RA_ITEM_CODE AS JOB_C , '1' AS INDV_YN , '0' AS CORP_YN , A.RA_ITEM_IDJOB_NM1 AS JOB_B_NM , A.RA_ITEM_NM AS JOB_NM FROM RA_ITEM_IDJOB A WHERE A.RA_IDJOB_YN5 = 'Y' UNION ALL SELECT --R21403 대부업자, 환전상, 소액해외송급업자 'R214' RSK_CATG2_C , 'R21403' RSK_ELMT_C , A.RA_ITEM_CODE AS JOB_C , '0' AS INDV_YN , '1' AS CORP_YN , ( SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE DTL_C = 'R214' AND GRP_C = 'S002' ) AS JOB_B_NM , A.RA_ITEM_NM AS JOB_NM FROM RA_ITEM_CORJOB A WHERE A.RA_CORJOB_YN6 = 'Y'
UNION ALL
SELECT --R21404 귀금속, 예술품, 골동품 판매상 'R214' RSK_CATG2_C , 'R21404' RSK_ELMT_C , A.RA_ITEM_CODE AS JOB_C , '1' AS INDV_YN , '0' AS CORP_YN , A.RA_ITEM_IDJOB_NM1 AS JOB_B_NM , A.RA_ITEM_NM AS JOB_NM FROM RA_ITEM_IDJOB A WHERE A.RA_IDJOB_YN6 = 'Y' UNION ALL SELECT --R21404 귀금속, 예술품, 골동품 판매상 'R214' RSK_CATG2_C , 'R21404' RSK_ELMT_C , A.RA_ITEM_CODE AS JOB_C , '0' AS INDV_YN , '1' AS CORP_YN , ( SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE DTL_C = 'R214' AND GRP_C = 'S002' ) AS JOB_B_NM , A.RA_ITEM_NM AS JOB_NM FROM RA_ITEM_CORJOB A WHERE A.RA_CORJOB_YN7 = 'Y'
UNION ALL
SELECT --R21405 주류 도소매업, 유흥주점업 'R214' RSK_CATG2_C , 'R21405' RSK_ELMT_C , A.RA_ITEM_CODE AS JOB_C , '1' AS INDV_YN , '0' AS CORP_YN , A.RA_ITEM_IDJOB_NM1 AS JOB_B_NM , A.RA_ITEM_NM AS JOB_NM FROM RA_ITEM_IDJOB A WHERE A.RA_IDJOB_STA_YN1 = 'Y' UNION ALL SELECT --R21405 주류 도소매업, 유흥주점업 'R214' RSK_CATG2_C , 'R21405' RSK_ELMT_C , A.RA_ITEM_CODE AS JOB_C , '0' AS INDV_YN , '1' AS CORP_YN , ( SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE DTL_C = 'R214' AND GRP_C = 'S002' ) AS JOB_B_NM , A.RA_ITEM_NM AS JOB_NM FROM RA_ITEM_CORJOB A WHERE A.RA_CORJOB_STA_YN1 = 'Y'
) M

INSERT INTO SRBA_ETC_I (BAS_YYMM , RSK_ELMT_C, RA_ITEM_CODE, RA_ITEM_NM, RSK_VALT_ITEM, RA_ITEM_CD, RA_ST_INTV_VAL, RA_ET_INTV_VAL, RA_ITEM_SCR, ABS_HRSK_YN, DR_DT, DR_TIME) SELECT #{basYymm} BAS_YYMM , RSK_ELMT_C , RA_ITEM_CODE , RA_ITEM_NM , RSK_VALT_ITEM , RA_ITEM_CD , RA_ST_INTV_VAL , RA_ET_INTV_VAL , RA_ITEM_SCR , ABS_HRSK_YN , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') FROM ( SELECT A.RA_ITEM_CD , A.RA_ITEM_CODE , B.RSK_ELMT_C_NM AS RA_ITEM_NM , A.ABS_HRSK_YN , A.RA_ITEM_SCR , A.RA_ST_INTV_VAL , A.RA_ET_INTV_VAL , B.RSK_CATG2_C , B.RSK_ELMT_C , B.RSK_VALT_ITEM FROM RA_ITEM_COMMON A , ( SELECT RSK_CATG2_C, RSK_ELMT_C , ( SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE DTL_C = RSK_ELMT_C AND GRP_C = 'S003' ) AS RSK_ELMT_C_NM , RSK_VALT_ITEM , ( SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE DTL_C = RSK_VALT_ITEM AND GRP_C = 'R342' ) AS RSK_VALT_ITEM_NM , CASE WHEN RSK_VALT_ITEM = 'R34219' THEN 'B001' WHEN RSK_VALT_ITEM = 'R34220' THEN 'B002' WHEN RSK_VALT_ITEM = 'R34221' THEN 'B003' WHEN RSK_VALT_ITEM = 'R34222' THEN 'B004' WHEN RSK_VALT_ITEM = 'R34223' THEN 'B005' WHEN RSK_VALT_ITEM = 'R34224' THEN 'B006' WHEN RSK_VALT_ITEM = 'R34225' THEN 'B007' WHEN RSK_VALT_ITEM = 'R34226' THEN 'B008' WHEN RSK_VALT_ITEM = 'R34227' THEN 'B009' WHEN RSK_VALT_ITEM = 'R34228' THEN 'B010' WHEN RSK_VALT_ITEM = 'R34229' THEN 'B011' WHEN RSK_VALT_ITEM = 'R34230' THEN 'B012' WHEN RSK_VALT_ITEM = 'R34231' THEN 'B013' WHEN RSK_VALT_ITEM = 'R34232' THEN 'B014' WHEN RSK_VALT_ITEM = 'R34233' THEN 'B015' WHEN RSK_VALT_ITEM = 'R34234' THEN 'B016' WHEN RSK_VALT_ITEM = 'R34235' THEN 'B017' WHEN RSK_VALT_ITEM = 'R34236' THEN 'B018' WHEN RSK_VALT_ITEM = 'R34237' THEN 'B019' ELSE '' END AS RA_ITEM_CD FROM SRBA_RISK_ELMT_M WHERE RSK_CATG1_C = 'R5' --거래 AND BAS_YYMM = (SELECT MAX(BAS_YYMM) AS BAS_YYMM FROM SRBA_RISK_ELMT_M ) ) B WHERE A.RA_ITEM_CD = B.RA_ITEM_CD )

INSERT INTO SRBA_ETC_I (BAS_YYMM , RSK_ELMT_C, RA_ITEM_CODE, RA_ITEM_NM, RSK_VALT_ITEM, RA_ITEM_CD, RA_ST_INTV_VAL, RA_ET_INTV_VAL, RA_ITEM_SCR, ABS_HRSK_YN, DR_DT, DR_TIME) SELECT #{basYymm} BAS_YYMM , RSK_ELMT_C , RA_ITEM_CODE , RA_ITEM_NM , RSK_VALT_ITEM , RA_ITEM_CD , RA_ST_INTV_VAL , RA_ET_INTV_VAL , RA_ITEM_SCR , ABS_HRSK_YN , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') FROM ( SELECT 'R30111' AS RSK_ELMT_C , A.RA_ITEM_CODE , A.RA_ITEM_NM , 'R34217' AS RSK_VALT_ITEM , 'I020' AS RA_ITEM_CD , 0 AS RA_ST_INTV_VAL , 0 AS RA_ET_INTV_VAL , A.RA_ITEM_SCR , A.ABS_HRSK_YN FROM RA_ITEM_COMMON A WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'B020' AND A.ABS_HRSK_YN = 'Y'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'R30113' AS RSK_ELMT_C , A.RA_ITEM_CODE , A.RA_ITEM_NM , 'R34217' AS RSK_VALT_ITEM , 'I020' AS RA_ITEM_CD , 0 AS RA_ST_INTV_VAL , 0 AS RA_ET_INTV_VAL , A.RA_ITEM_SCR , A.ABS_HRSK_YN FROM RA_ITEM_COMMON A WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'B020' AND A.RA_ITEM_SCR >= 6.67 AND A.ABS_HRSK_YN = 'N' )

INSERT INTO SRBA_CUST_I ( BAS_YYMM , RNMCNO , CS_NM , NTN_CD ,INDV_CORP_CCD , INDST_RSK_DVD_CD ,AML_JOB_GUBN , LG_AMT_ASTS_F ,PEP_YN , AGE_UNDER_YN , AGE_OLD_YN , NEW_ESTB_CORP_YN , NPRFT_GROUP_YN , NFR_DIT_YN , IN3YEAR_ESTB_YN , FNDTN_DT , DR_DT ,DR_TIME ) SELECT #{basYymm} BAS_YYMM , RNMCNO , CS_NM , NTN_CD --국가코드 , INDV_CORP_CCD --개인법인구분코드 1:개인 2;법인 , INDST_RSK_DVD_CD --법인일경우 업종코드 , AML_JOB_GUBN --직업코드 , LG_AMT_ASTS_F --고액자산가여부 --R20301 고액자산가 : insertCustI , PEP_YN , CASE WHEN AGE < 19 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS AGE_UNDER_YN --미성년자 --R21002 미성년자 : insertCustI , CASE WHEN AGE >= 65 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS AGE_OLD_YN --65세 이상 고령자 --R21003 65세 이상 고령자 : insertCustI ,(CASE WHEN TRIM(FNDTN_DT) IS NULL THEN 'N' WHEN SSQ.FN_DATECHK(TRIM(FNDTN_DT)) = 'N' THEN 'N' WHEN (SYSDATE - TO_DATE(FNDTN_DT,'YYYYMMDD')) / 365 <=1 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END ) NEW_ESTB_CORP_YN ,NPRFT_GROUP_F --비영리단체구분코드 Y:비영리, N:영리 ,NFR_DIT_CD --외국인여부 외국인 Y ,(CASE WHEN TRIM(FNDTN_DT) IS NULL THEN 'N' WHEN SSQ.FN_DATECHK(TRIM(FNDTN_DT)) = 'N' THEN 'N' WHEN (SYSDATE - TO_DATE(FNDTN_DT,'YYYYMMDD')) / (365*3) <=1 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END ) IN3YEAR_ESTB_YN --최근 3년 이내 설립 법인 --R21202 최근 3년 이내 설립 법인 ,FNDTN_DT ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') FROM ( SELECT M.RNMCNO ,CS_NM ,NTN_CD --국가코드 ,RSDNC_F --거주여부 ,INDV_CORP_CCD --개인법인구분코드 1:개인 2;법인 ,INDST_RSK_DVD_CD --법인일경우 업종코드 ,AML_JOB_GUBN--직업코드 ,(SELECT DECODE(COUNT(1),0,'N','Y') AS LG_AMT_ASTS_F FROM NIC40B WHERE RNMCNO = M.RNMCNO AND BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm}) LG_AMT_ASTS_F --고액자산가여부 ,(CASE WHEN NTV_FGNR_CCD = 'A' THEN 'N' WHEN NTV_FGNR_CCD = 'B' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END) NFR_DIT_CD --내외국인 AS-IS A:내국인, B:외국인 ,A.PEP_YN --정치적주요인물 ,A.NPRFT_GROUP_F --비영리단체구분코드 Y:비영리, N:영리 ,(SELECT FNDTN_DT FROM NIC03B WHERE RNMCNO = M.RNMCNO) FNDTN_DT --설립일자 , (CASE WHEN SSQ.FN_DATECHK(BRTDY) = 'Y' THEN FN_GET_AGE( BRTDY ) ELSE 20 END) AGE FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT RNMCNO FROM ( /*계약자*/ SELECT /*+ FULL(A) PARALLEL(4) */ DISTINCT RNMCNO FROM KRBA_TRN_I A WHERE 1=1 AND DL_DT >= #{tgtTrnSdt} AND DL_DT < #{tgtTrnEdt} UNION ALL /*대리인*/ SELECT /*+ FULL(M) PARALLEL(4) */ DISTINCT C.PRXY_RNMCNO FROM KRBA_TRN_I M, NIC17B A, NIC18B C WHERE 1=1 AND M.GNL_AC_NO = A.GNL_AC_NO AND M.DL_DT >= #{tgtTrnSdt} AND M.DL_DT < #{tgtTrnEdt} AND A.GNL_AC_NO = C.GNL_AC_NO ) ) M ,NIC01B A WHERE 1=1 AND M.RNMCNO = A.RNMCNO ) M

INSERT INTO SRBA_NAT_T(BAS_YYMM,RSK_ELMT_C,RNMCNO)
SELECT BAS_YYMM ,'R10101' AS RSK_ELMT_C ,RNMCNO FROM SRBA_CUST_I WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND NTN_CD IN ( SELECT NTN_CD FROM SRBA_NAT_I WHERE 1=1 AND BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND RSK_ELMT_C = 'R10101' --R10101 FATF Black list )
UNION ALL
SELECT BAS_YYMM ,'R10102' AS RSK_ELMT_C ,RNMCNO FROM SRBA_CUST_I WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND NTN_CD IN ( SELECT NTN_CD FROM SRBA_NAT_I WHERE 1=1 AND BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND RSK_ELMT_C = 'R10102' --R10102 FATF Grey list )
UNION ALL
SELECT BAS_YYMM ,'R10201' AS RSK_ELMT_C ,RNMCNO FROM SRBA_CUST_I WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND NTN_CD IN ( SELECT NTN_CD FROM SRBA_NAT_I WHERE 1=1 AND BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND RSK_ELMT_C = 'R10201' --R10201 FinCEN 조치국가 )
UNION ALL
SELECT BAS_YYMM ,'R10301' AS RSK_ELMT_C ,RNMCNO FROM SRBA_CUST_I WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND NTN_CD IN ( SELECT NTN_CD FROM SRBA_NAT_I WHERE 1=1 AND BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND RSK_ELMT_C = 'R10301' --R10301 UN 제재국가 )
UNION ALL
SELECT BAS_YYMM ,'R10401' AS RSK_ELMT_C ,RNMCNO FROM SRBA_CUST_I WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND NTN_CD IN ( SELECT NTN_CD FROM SRBA_NAT_I WHERE 1=1 AND BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND RSK_ELMT_C = 'R10401' --R10401 OFAC 제재국가 )
UNION ALL
SELECT BAS_YYMM ,'R10501' AS RSK_ELMT_C ,RNMCNO FROM SRBA_CUST_I WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND NTN_CD IN ( SELECT NTN_CD FROM SRBA_NAT_I WHERE 1=1 AND BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND RSK_ELMT_C = 'R10501' --R10501 OECD EOIR 등급이 미준수 또는 일부 준수인 국가 )
UNION ALL
SELECT BAS_YYMM ,'R10601' AS RSK_ELMT_C ,RNMCNO FROM SRBA_CUST_I WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND NTN_CD IN ( SELECT NTN_CD FROM SRBA_NAT_I WHERE 1=1 AND BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND RSK_ELMT_C = 'R10601' --R10601 TI 부패인식지수 )
UNION ALL
SELECT BAS_YYMM ,'R10701' AS RSK_ELMT_C ,RNMCNO FROM SRBA_CUST_I WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND NTN_CD IN ( SELECT NTN_CD FROM SRBA_NAT_I WHERE 1=1 AND BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND RSK_ELMT_C = 'R10701' --R10701 INCSR 마약생산유통국가 )
UNION ALL
SELECT BAS_YYMM ,'R10702' AS RSK_ELMT_C ,RNMCNO FROM SRBA_CUST_I WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND NTN_CD IN ( SELECT NTN_CD FROM SRBA_NAT_I WHERE 1=1 AND BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND RSK_ELMT_C = 'R10702' --R10702 INCSR 마약 밀매 수익금 거래 국가 )
UNION ALL
SELECT BAS_YYMM ,'R10801' AS RSK_ELMT_C ,RNMCNO FROM SRBA_CUST_I WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND NTN_CD IN ( SELECT NTN_CD FROM SRBA_NAT_I WHERE 1=1 AND BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND RSK_ELMT_C = 'R10801' --R10801 EU 제재국가 )
UNION ALL
SELECT BAS_YYMM ,'R10802' AS RSK_ELMT_C ,RNMCNO FROM SRBA_CUST_I WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND NTN_CD IN ( SELECT NTN_CD FROM SRBA_NAT_I WHERE 1=1 AND BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND RSK_ELMT_C = 'R10802' --R10802 EU 고위험 제3국 )
UNION ALL
SELECT BAS_YYMM ,'R10901' AS RSK_ELMT_C ,RNMCNO FROM SRBA_CUST_I WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND NTN_CD IN ( SELECT NTN_CD FROM SRBA_NAT_I WHERE 1=1 AND BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND RSK_ELMT_C = 'R10901' --R10901 Basel 자금세탁위험점수 )

INSERT INTO SRBA_CUST_T(BAS_YYMM,RSK_ELMT_C,RNMCNO) --R20101 가상자산사업 의심업종 SELECT BAS_YYMM ,'R20101' AS RSK_ELMT_C ,RNMCNO FROM SRBA_CUST_I WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND INDST_RSK_DVD_CD IN ( SELECT JOB_C FROM SRBA_JOB_I WHERE RSK_ELMT_C = 'R20101' )
UNION ALL
--R20201 가상자산사업자 SELECT BAS_YYMM ,'R20201' AS RSK_ELMT_C ,RNMCNO FROM SRBA_CUST_I WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND AML_JOB_GUBN IN ( SELECT JOB_C FROM SRBA_JOB_I WHERE RSK_ELMT_C = 'R20201' )
UNION ALL
--R20301 고액자산가 SELECT BAS_YYMM ,'R20301' AS RSK_ELMT_C ,RNMCNO FROM SRBA_CUST_I WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND LG_AMT_ASTS_F = 'Y'
UNION ALL
--R20601 의료, 제약 관련 산업/직종 SELECT BAS_YYMM ,'R20601' AS RSK_ELMT_C , RNMCNO FROM SRBA_CUST_I WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND ( AML_JOB_GUBN IN ( SELECT JOB_C FROM SRBA_JOB_I WHERE RSK_ELMT_C = 'R20601' AND INDV_YN = '1') OR INDST_RSK_DVD_CD IN ( SELECT JOB_C FROM SRBA_JOB_I WHERE RSK_ELMT_C = 'R20601' AND CORP_YN = '1') )
UNION ALL --R20602 건설 산업 SELECT BAS_YYMM ,'R20602' AS RSK_ELMT_C ,RNMCNO FROM SRBA_CUST_I WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND INDST_RSK_DVD_CD IN ( SELECT JOB_C FROM SRBA_JOB_I WHERE RSK_ELMT_C = 'R20602' )
UNION ALL --R20603 무기, 방위산업 SELECT BAS_YYMM ,'R20603' AS RSK_ELMT_C , RNMCNO FROM SRBA_CUST_I WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND ( AML_JOB_GUBN IN ( SELECT JOB_C FROM SRBA_JOB_I WHERE RSK_ELMT_C = 'R20603' AND INDV_YN = '1') OR INDST_RSK_DVD_CD IN ( SELECT JOB_C FROM SRBA_JOB_I WHERE RSK_ELMT_C = 'R20603' AND CORP_YN = '1' ) )
UNION ALL --R20604 채광, 금속, 고물상 SELECT BAS_YYMM ,'R20604' AS RSK_ELMT_C , RNMCNO FROM SRBA_CUST_I WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND ( AML_JOB_GUBN IN ( SELECT JOB_C FROM SRBA_JOB_I WHERE RSK_ELMT_C = 'R20604' AND INDV_YN = '1') OR INDST_RSK_DVD_CD IN ( SELECT JOB_C FROM SRBA_JOB_I WHERE RSK_ELMT_C = 'R20604' AND CORP_YN = '1' ) )
UNION ALL --R20701 법률, 회계, 세무 관련 산업/직종 SELECT BAS_YYMM ,'R20701' AS RSK_ELMT_C , RNMCNO FROM SRBA_CUST_I WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND ( AML_JOB_GUBN IN ( SELECT JOB_C FROM SRBA_JOB_I WHERE RSK_ELMT_C = 'R20701' AND INDV_YN = '1') OR INDST_RSK_DVD_CD IN ( SELECT JOB_C FROM SRBA_JOB_I WHERE RSK_ELMT_C = 'R20701' AND CORP_YN = '1' ) )
UNION ALL --R20702 투자자문 관련 산업/직종 SELECT BAS_YYMM ,'R20702' AS RSK_ELMT_C , RNMCNO FROM SRBA_CUST_I WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND ( AML_JOB_GUBN IN ( SELECT JOB_C FROM SRBA_JOB_I WHERE RSK_ELMT_C = 'R20702' AND INDV_YN = '1') OR INDST_RSK_DVD_CD IN ( SELECT JOB_C FROM SRBA_JOB_I WHERE RSK_ELMT_C = 'R20702' AND CORP_YN = '1' ) )
UNION ALL --R20703 부동산 관련 산업/직종 SELECT BAS_YYMM ,'R20703' AS RSK_ELMT_C , RNMCNO FROM SRBA_CUST_I WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND ( AML_JOB_GUBN IN ( SELECT JOB_C FROM SRBA_JOB_I WHERE RSK_ELMT_C = 'R20703' AND INDV_YN = '1') OR INDST_RSK_DVD_CD IN ( SELECT JOB_C FROM SRBA_JOB_I WHERE RSK_ELMT_C = 'R20703' AND CORP_YN = '1' ) )
UNION ALL --R20801 비거주자 SELECT #{basYymm} AS BAS_YYMM ,'R20801' AS RSK_ELMT_C , TO_CHAR(RNMCNO,'9999999999') AS RNMCNO FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AS RNMCNO FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD A , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_ADDN_IFMN C , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_RGSN_DTLS D WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = C.CLNT_ENTY_ID AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = D.CLNT_ENTY_ID
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM SID.IDO_A_UUA_ACNT B WHERE 1 = 1 AND (B.ACNT_STAS_TYPE_CODE IN ('AC', 'IN') -- 정상/통합계좌만 OR (B.ACNT_STAS_TYPE_CODE = 'CL' AND B.CLSG_DATE > #{tgtTrnSdt})) AND B.ACNT_TYPE_CODE IN ('GNAC', 'FPAC', 'FOAC', 'SVAC') -- 리테일계좌만
AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = B.ACNT_OWNR_ID ) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD B WHERE B.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND B.RGBR_CODE = '21220' /* 연금전략팀 */ AND B.CRFL_FLTG_RSLT_CODE NOT IN ('1','2','3') /* 요주의필터링결과코드 */ ) AND D.PRCE_DATE <= #{tgtTrnEdt} -- 고객등록일자 AND A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE IN ('H', 'M', 'L') AND A.RSDT_CNTY_ID <> 1000000001 -- 거주국가ID : 대한민국이 아니고 AND A.RSDT_CNTY_ID > 0 AND A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE = '1' -- CDD고객구분코드(1.개인, 2.영리법인, 3.비영리법인) )
UNION ALL --R20501 H.Net #10067 등록 고객 SELECT #{basYymm} AS BAS_YYMM ,'R20501' AS RSK_ELMT_C , TO_CHAR(CLNT_ENTY_ID, '9999999999' ) AS RNMCNO FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT CLNT_ENTY_ID FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_BLLS_PRS_IFMN WHERE DEL_YN != 'Y' --삭제여부 )
UNION ALL --R20901 요주의 인물 동일인 SELECT #{basYymm} AS BAS_YYMM ,'R20901' AS RSK_ELMT_C , TO_CHAR(RNMCNO, '9999999999' ) AS RNMCNO FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT RNMCNO FROM ( SELECT A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AS RNMCNO FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CRFL_FLTG_FLFL_DT A /* 요주의필터링수행내역 */ , SID.IDO_A_MAH_CRFL_FLTG_APRV_DT B /* 요주의필터링결재내역 */ WHERE A.APRV_RGSN_DATE = B.APRV_RGSN_DATE AND A.APRV_RGSN_SQNO = B.APRV_RGSN_SQNO AND A.FLFL_EMPY_NO != 'AMLBAT' -- 수행사원번호 AND B.CRFL_FLTG_APRV_STAS_CODE = '21' -- 요주의필터링결재상태코드 (21:준법감시인 승인) AND A.APRV_RGSN_DATE BETWEEN #{tgtTrnSdt} AND #{tgtTrnEdt}
UNION ALL
SELECT A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AS RNMCNO FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CRFL_FLTG_FLFL_DT A /* 요주의필터링수행내역 */ , SID.IDO_A_MAH_CRFL_FLTG_APRV_DT B /* 요주의필터링결재내역 */ WHERE A.APRV_RGSN_DATE = B.APRV_RGSN_DATE AND A.APRV_RGSN_SQNO = B.APRV_RGSN_SQNO AND A.FLFL_EMPY_NO = 'AMLBAT' -- 수행사원번호 AND B.CRFL_FLTG_APRV_STAS_CODE = '21' -- 요주의필터링결재상태코드 (21:준법감시인 승인) AND A.APRV_RGSN_DATE BETWEEN #{tgtTrnSdt} AND #{tgtTrnEdt} ) )
UNION ALL --R21001 무직자 SELECT BAS_YYMM ,'R21001' AS RSK_ELMT_C ,RNMCNO FROM SRBA_CUST_I WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND AML_JOB_GUBN IN ( SELECT JOB_C FROM SRBA_JOB_I WHERE RSK_ELMT_C = 'R21001' )
UNION ALL --R21002 미성년자 SELECT BAS_YYMM ,'R21002' AS RSK_ELMT_C ,RNMCNO FROM SRBA_CUST_I WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND AGE_UNDER_YN = 'Y'
UNION ALL --R21003 65세 이상 고령자 SELECT BAS_YYMM ,'R21003' AS RSK_ELMT_C ,RNMCNO FROM SRBA_CUST_I WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND AGE_OLD_YN = 'Y'
UNION ALL --R21101 CDD 등록사유 = 98(자금세탁우려) SELECT #{basYymm} AS BAS_YYMM ,'R21101' AS RSK_ELMT_C , RNMCNO FROM NIC35B WHERE CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE = '98'
UNION ALL --R21201 비상장기업 SELECT #{basYymm} AS BAS_YYMM ,'R21201' AS RSK_ELMT_C ,RNMCNO FROM NIC03B --법인고객정보_NIC03B WHERE LSTNG_F = 'N' --상장여부
UNION ALL --R21202 최근 3년 이내 설립 법인 SELECT BAS_YYMM ,'R21202' AS RSK_ELMT_C ,RNMCNO FROM SRBA_CUST_I WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND IN3YEAR_ESTB_YN = 'Y'
UNION ALL --R21203 비영리법인(단체) SELECT BAS_YYMM ,'R21203' AS RSK_ELMT_C ,RNMCNO FROM SRBA_CUST_I WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND NPRFT_GROUP_YN = 'Y'
UNION ALL --R21401 오락, 도박, 스포츠 관련 산업/직종 SELECT BAS_YYMM ,'R21401' AS RSK_ELMT_C , RNMCNO FROM SRBA_CUST_I WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND ( AML_JOB_GUBN IN ( SELECT JOB_C FROM SRBA_JOB_I WHERE RSK_ELMT_C = 'R21401' AND INDV_YN = '1') OR INDST_RSK_DVD_CD IN ( SELECT JOB_C FROM SRBA_JOB_I WHERE RSK_ELMT_C = 'R21401' AND CORP_YN = '1' ) )
UNION ALL --R21402 카지노 SELECT BAS_YYMM ,'R21402' AS RSK_ELMT_C , RNMCNO FROM SRBA_CUST_I WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND INDST_RSK_DVD_CD IN ( SELECT JOB_C FROM SRBA_JOB_I WHERE RSK_ELMT_C = 'R21402' AND CORP_YN = '1' )
UNION ALL --R21403 대부업자, 환전상, 소액해외송급업자 SELECT BAS_YYMM ,'R21403' AS RSK_ELMT_C , RNMCNO FROM SRBA_CUST_I WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND ( AML_JOB_GUBN IN ( SELECT JOB_C FROM SRBA_JOB_I WHERE RSK_ELMT_C = 'R21403' AND INDV_YN = '1') OR INDST_RSK_DVD_CD IN ( SELECT JOB_C FROM SRBA_JOB_I WHERE RSK_ELMT_C = 'R21403' AND CORP_YN = '1' ) )
UNION ALL --R21404 귀금속, 예술품, 골동품 판매상 SELECT BAS_YYMM ,'R21404' AS RSK_ELMT_C , RNMCNO FROM SRBA_CUST_I WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND ( AML_JOB_GUBN IN ( SELECT JOB_C FROM SRBA_JOB_I WHERE RSK_ELMT_C = 'R21404' AND INDV_YN = '1') OR INDST_RSK_DVD_CD IN ( SELECT JOB_C FROM SRBA_JOB_I WHERE RSK_ELMT_C = 'R21404' AND CORP_YN = '1' ) )
UNION ALL --R21405 주류 도소매업, 유흥주점업 SELECT BAS_YYMM ,'R21405' AS RSK_ELMT_C , RNMCNO FROM SRBA_CUST_I WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND ( AML_JOB_GUBN IN ( SELECT JOB_C FROM SRBA_JOB_I WHERE RSK_ELMT_C = 'R21405' AND INDV_YN = '1') OR INDST_RSK_DVD_CD IN ( SELECT JOB_C FROM SRBA_JOB_I WHERE RSK_ELMT_C = 'R21405' AND CORP_YN = '1' ) )
UNION ALL
--R21501 최근 1년 이내에 당사자 또는 관련인으로 3회 이상 STR 보고된 고객 SELECT #{basYymm} AS BAS_YYMM ,'R21501' AS RSK_ELMT_C , RNMCNO FROM ( SELECT SUBSTR(DL_P_RNMCNO,1,10) AS RNMCNO FROM SSQ.NIC66B WHERE 1 = 1 AND SSPS_DL_CRT_DT >= #{tgtTrnSdt} AND SSPS_DL_CRT_DT < #{tgtTrnEdt} AND RPR_PRGRS_CCD = '99' AND SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD IN ('STR','KYC')
UNION ALL
SELECT AFPR_RNMCNO AS RNMCNO FROM SSQ.NIC102B WHERE 1 = 1 AND SSPS_DL_CRT_DT >= #{tgtTrnSdt} AND SSPS_DL_CRT_DT < #{tgtTrnEdt} AND SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD IN ('STR','KYC') ) GROUP BY RNMCNO HAVING COUNT(1) >= 3
UNION ALL
--R20401 전기통신금융사기사고 등록 고객 SELECT #{basYymm} AS BAS_YYMM ,'R20401' AS RSK_ELMT_C , RNMCNO FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT RNMCNO FROM ( SELECT TO_CHAR(CLNT_ENTY_ID, '9999999999' ) AS RNMCNO FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_DBT_NOMN_PRCE WHERE PRCE_DATE >= #{tgtTrnSdt} AND PRCE_DATE < #{tgtTrnEdt}
UNION ALL
SELECT TO_CHAR(B.ENTY_ID, '9999999999' ) AS RNMCNO FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_DBT_NOMN A , SID.IDO_A_UUE_CLIENT_ENTY_ALIAS B WHERE TRIM(A.CLNT_NO_CRYP) = TRIM(B.ENTY_ALIS_CRYP) AND A.PRCE_DATE >= #{tgtTrnSdt} AND A.PRCE_DATE < #{tgtTrnEdt} ) )
UNION ALL
--R21004 [자금력 의심 고객] 채무불이행 고객 SELECT #{basYymm} AS BAS_YYMM ,'R21004' AS RSK_ELMT_C , RNMCNO FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT RNMCNO FROM ( SELECT TO_CHAR(CLNT_ENTY_ID, '9999999999' ) AS RNMCNO FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CLNT_CRDT_DTLS WHERE DELY_SECT_CODE <> '1' AND CRDT_IFMN_CNCL_SECT_CODE = '00' AND CNCL_DATE = '00000000' AND IFMN_RECV_DATE >= #{tgtTrnSdt} AND IFMN_RECV_DATE < #{tgtTrnEdt} ) )
UNION ALL
--R21301 [차명 의심 고객] 고위험 대리인 거래 고객 SELECT #{basYymm} AS BAS_YYMM ,'R21301' AS RSK_ELMT_C , RNMCNO FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT RNMCNO FROM ( SELECT TO_CHAR(CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID, '9999999999' ) AS RNMCNO FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD WHERE CDD_TAGT_SECT_CODE = '02' AND CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE = 'H' AND CDD_FLFL_DATE >= #{tgtTrnSdt} AND CDD_FLFL_DATE < #{tgtTrnEdt}
UNION ALL
SELECT TO_CHAR(A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID, '9999999999' ) AS RNMCNO FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD A , SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_AGNT_IFMN B WHERE A.CDD_TAGT_CLNT_NO_CRYP = B.AGNT_CLNT_RNNO_CRYP AND A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE = 'H' AND A.CDD_FLFL_DATE >= #{tgtTrnSdt} AND A.CDD_FLFL_DATE < #{tgtTrnEdt} ) )
UNION ALL
--R21302 [차명 의심 고객] 가족, 직원 외 대리인 거래 고객 SELECT #{basYymm} AS BAS_YYMM ,'R21302' AS RSK_ELMT_C , RNMCNO FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT RNMCNO FROM ( SELECT TO_CHAR(CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID, '9999999999' ) AS RNMCNO FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD WHERE (CDD_AGNT_RLTP_SECT_CODE IN ('99', '07') OR CDD_AGNT_ENTS_DOC_CODE = '99') AND CDD_FLFL_DATE >= #{tgtTrnSdt} AND CDD_FLFL_DATE < #{tgtTrnEdt}
UNION ALL
SELECT TO_CHAR(A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID, '9999999999' ) AS RNMCNO FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD A , SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_AGNT_IFMN B WHERE A.CDD_TAGT_CLNT_NO_CRYP = B.AGNT_CLNT_RNNO_CRYP AND ( A.CDD_AGNT_RLTP_SECT_CODE IN ('99', '07') OR A.CDD_AGNT_ENTS_DOC_CODE = '99') AND A.CDD_FLFL_DATE >= #{tgtTrnSdt} AND A.CDD_FLFL_DATE < #{tgtTrnEdt} ) )

INSERT INTO SRBA_CUST_T(BAS_YYMM,RSK_ELMT_C,RNMCNO) --R30111 상품_업무규정 정의 당연고위험 대상 상품 SELECT #{basYymm} AS BAS_YYMM ,'R30111' AS RSK_ELMT_C , RNMCNO FROM ( SELECT /*+ MATERIALIZE PARALLEL(TRN 4) FULL(TRN) USE_HASH(TRN) */ DISTINCT TRN.RNMCNO FROM KRBA_TRN_I TRN , SRBA_ETC_I E WHERE 1 = 1 AND TRN.BAS_YYMM BETWEEN SUBSTR(#{tgtTrnSdt},1,6) AND SUBSTR(#{tgtTrnEdt},1,6) AND E.BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND E.RA_ITEM_CODE = SUBSTR(TRN.GDS_NO, 1, 3) AND E.RSK_ELMT_C = 'R30111' )
UNION ALL
--R30113 상품_고위험 대상 상품 ( 당연고위험 아니고 6.67위험점수 이상 대상) SELECT #{basYymm} AS BAS_YYMM , 'R30113' AS RSK_ELMT_C , RNMCNO FROM ( SELECT /*+ MATERIALIZE PARALLEL(TRN 4) FULL(TRN) USE_HASH(TRN) */ DISTINCT TRN.RNMCNO FROM KRBA_TRN_I TRN , SRBA_ETC_I E WHERE 1 = 1 AND TRN.BAS_YYMM BETWEEN SUBSTR(#{tgtTrnSdt},1,6) AND SUBSTR(#{tgtTrnEdt},1,6) AND E.BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND E.RA_ITEM_CODE = SUBSTR(TRN.GDS_NO, 1, 3) AND E.RSK_ELMT_C = 'R30113' AND E.ABS_HRSK_YN = 'N' )

INSERT INTO SRBA_CUST_T(BAS_YYMM,RSK_ELMT_C,RNMCNO) --R40102 대면_은행연계 SELECT #{basYymm} AS BAS_YYMM ,'R40102' AS RSK_ELMT_C , RNMCNO FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT RNMCNO FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD C , NIC01B CUS WHERE 1=1 AND C.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE like 'C%' AND ( C.CDD_CMPL_YN = 'Y' OR C.EDD_TAGT_YN = 'Y' ) --CDD완료여부, EDD대상여부 AND C.CDD_FLFL_DATE BETWEEN #{tgtTrnSdt} AND #{tgtTrnEdt} AND C.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = CUS.RNMCNO )
UNION ALL
--R40103 대면_Pop-Note SELECT #{basYymm} AS BAS_YYMM ,'R40103' AS RSK_ELMT_C , RNMCNO FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT RNMCNO FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD C , NIC01B CUS WHERE 1=1 AND C.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE = 'A16' AND ( C.CDD_CMPL_YN = 'Y' OR C.EDD_TAGT_YN = 'Y' ) --CDD완료여부, EDD대상여부 AND C.CDD_FLFL_DATE BETWEEN #{tgtTrnSdt} AND #{tgtTrnEdt} AND C.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = CUS.RNMCNO )
UNION ALL
--R40101 비대면 건 수 SELECT #{basYymm} AS BAS_YYMM ,'R40101' AS RSK_ELMT_C , RNMCNO FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT RNMCNO FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD C , NIC01B CUS WHERE 1=1 AND ( C.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE like 'G%' or C.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE like 'H%' or C.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE like 'I%') AND ( C.CDD_CMPL_YN = 'Y' OR C.EDD_TAGT_YN = 'Y' ) --CDD완료여부, EDD대상여부 AND C.CDD_FLFL_DATE BETWEEN #{tgtTrnSdt} AND #{tgtTrnEdt} AND C.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = CUS.RNMCNO )

INSERT INTO SRBA_CUST_T(BAS_YYMM,RSK_ELMT_C,RNMCNO) --K20401 개인 고객 규모 (I.1.03.01) 개인 고객 규모[명] SELECT #{basYymm} AS BAS_YYMM ,'K20401' AS RSK_ELMT_C ,TO_CHAR(RNMCNO,'9999999999') AS RNMCNO FROM ( SELECT /*+ FULL(A) PARALLEL(4) */ DISTINCT A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AS RNMCNO FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD A , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_ADDN_IFMN C , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_RGSN_DTLS D WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = C.CLNT_ENTY_ID AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = D.CLNT_ENTY_ID
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM SID.IDO_A_UUA_ACNT B WHERE 1 = 1 AND (B.ACNT_STAS_TYPE_CODE IN ('AC', 'IN') -- 정상/통합계좌만 OR (B.ACNT_STAS_TYPE_CODE = 'CL' AND B.CLSG_DATE > #{tgtTrnSdt})) AND B.ACNT_TYPE_CODE IN ('GNAC', 'FPAC', 'FOAC', 'SVAC') -- 리테일계좌만 AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = B.ACNT_OWNR_ID ) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD B WHERE B.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND B.RGBR_CODE = '21220' /* 연금전략팀 */ AND B.CRFL_FLTG_RSLT_CODE NOT IN ('1','2','3') /* 요주의필터링결과코드 */ ) AND D.PRCE_DATE <= #{tgtTrnEdt} -- 고객등록일자 AND A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE IN ('H', 'M', 'L') -- 등급 존재 AND A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE = '1' -- CDD고객구분코드(1.개인, 2.영리법인, 3.비영리법인) )
UNION ALL
--K20402 개인사업자 고객 규모 (I.1.03.02) 개인사업자 고객 규모[명] SELECT #{basYymm} AS BAS_YYMM ,'K20402' AS RSK_ELMT_C ,TO_CHAR(RNMCNO,'9999999999') AS RNMCNO FROM ( SELECT /*+ FULL(A) PARALLEL(4) */ DISTINCT A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AS RNMCNO FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD A , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_ADDN_IFMN C , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_RGSN_DTLS D WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = C.CLNT_ENTY_ID AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = D.CLNT_ENTY_ID
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM SID.IDO_A_UUA_ACNT B WHERE 1 = 1 AND (B.ACNT_STAS_TYPE_CODE IN ('AC', 'IN') -- 정상/통합계좌만 OR (B.ACNT_STAS_TYPE_CODE = 'CL' AND B.CLSG_DATE > #{tgtTrnSdt})) AND B.ACNT_TYPE_CODE IN ('GNAC', 'FPAC', 'FOAC', 'SVAC') -- 리테일계좌만 AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = B.ACNT_OWNR_ID ) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD B WHERE B.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND B.RGBR_CODE = '21220' /* 연금전략팀 */ AND B.CRFL_FLTG_RSLT_CODE NOT IN ('1','2','3') /* 요주의필터링결과코드 */ )
AND D.PRCE_DATE <= #{tgtTrnEdt} -- 고객등록일자 AND A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE IN ('H', 'M', 'L') -- 등급 존재 AND A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE = '1' -- CDD고객구분코드(1.개인, 2.영리법인, 3.비영리법인) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM SID.IDO_A_UUA_ACNT AA INNER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUA_ACNT_FUNCTION AF ON AA.ACNT_ID = AF.ACNT_ID AND AF.ACNT_FNCN_TYPE_CODE = 'PRBS' -- 개인사업용계좌 AND AF.ALWD_YN = 'Y' WHERE AA.ACNT_OWNR_ID = C.CLNT_ENTY_ID AND AA.ACNT_STAS_TYPE_CODE IN ('AC', 'IN') -- 정상/통합계좌만 ) )
UNION ALL
--K20403 법인 고객 규모 (I.1.03.03) 법인 고객 규모[개수] SELECT #{basYymm} AS BAS_YYMM ,'K20403' AS RSK_ELMT_C ,TO_CHAR(RNMCNO,'9999999999') AS RNMCNO FROM ( SELECT /*+ FULL(A) PARALLEL(4) */ DISTINCT A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AS RNMCNO FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD A , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_ADDN_IFMN C , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_RGSN_DTLS D WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = C.CLNT_ENTY_ID AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = D.CLNT_ENTY_ID
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM SID.IDO_A_UUA_ACNT B WHERE 1 = 1 AND (B.ACNT_STAS_TYPE_CODE IN ('AC', 'IN') -- 정상/통합계좌만 OR (B.ACNT_STAS_TYPE_CODE = 'CL' AND B.CLSG_DATE > #{tgtTrnSdt})) AND B.ACNT_TYPE_CODE IN ('GNAC', 'FPAC', 'FOAC', 'SVAC') -- 리테일계좌만 AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = B.ACNT_OWNR_ID ) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD B WHERE B.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND B.RGBR_CODE = '21220' /* 연금전략팀 */ AND B.CRFL_FLTG_RSLT_CODE NOT IN ('1','2','3') /* 요주의필터링결과코드 */ )
AND D.PRCE_DATE <= #{tgtTrnEdt} -- 고객등록일자 AND A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE IN ('H', 'M', 'L') -- 등급 존재 AND A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE IN ('2', '3') -- CDD고객구분코드(1.개인, 2.영리법인, 3.비영리법인) )
UNION ALL
--K20404 외국인 규모 (I.1.03.04) 외국인 규모[명] SELECT #{basYymm} AS BAS_YYMM ,'K20404' AS RSK_ELMT_C ,TO_CHAR(RNMCNO,'9999999999') AS RNMCNO FROM ( SELECT /*+ FULL(A) PARALLEL(4) */ DISTINCT A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AS RNMCNO FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD A , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_ADDN_IFMN C , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_RGSN_DTLS D WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = C.CLNT_ENTY_ID AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = D.CLNT_ENTY_ID
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM SID.IDO_A_UUA_ACNT B WHERE 1 = 1 AND (B.ACNT_STAS_TYPE_CODE IN ('AC', 'IN') -- 정상/통합계좌만 OR (B.ACNT_STAS_TYPE_CODE = 'CL' AND B.CLSG_DATE > #{tgtTrnSdt})) AND B.ACNT_TYPE_CODE IN ('GNAC', 'FPAC', 'FOAC', 'SVAC') -- 리테일계좌만
AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = B.ACNT_OWNR_ID ) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD B WHERE B.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND B.RGBR_CODE = '21220' /* 연금전략팀 */ AND B.CRFL_FLTG_RSLT_CODE NOT IN ('1','2','3') /* 요주의필터링결과코드 */ ) AND D.PRCE_DATE <= #{tgtTrnEdt} -- 고객등록일자 AND A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE IN ('H', 'M', 'L')
AND A.NTNY_ID <> 1000000001 -- 소속국가ID : 대한민국이 아니고 AND A.NTNY_ID > 0 )
UNION ALL
--K20101 CTR고객 규모 (I.1.06.01) CTR고객 규모[명] SELECT #{basYymm} AS BAS_YYMM ,'K20101' AS RSK_ELMT_C , TO_CHAR(DL_P_RNMCNO, '9999999999') AS RNMCNO FROM ( /*+ FULL(A) PARALLEL(4) */ SELECT DISTINCT A.DL_P_RNMCNO FROM SSQ.NIC66B A , SSQ.NIC71B B , SSQ.NIC75B C WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = B.SSPS_DL_ID AND B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND B.SSPS_DL_ID = C.SSPS_DL_ID AND B.GNL_AC_NO = C.GNL_AC_NO AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD IN ('CTR','CAC') AND DECODE(A.RPR_PRGRS_CCD,'99',1,0) = 1 -- 1:보고완료 AND C.DL_DT BETWEEN #{tgtTrnSdt} AND #{tgtTrnEdt} -- 거래일자 )
UNION ALL
--K40201 (채널) 익명거래 용이성 : 전자금융 서비스 이용자 규모 [I.4.01.02 전자금융서비스 가입자 규모] SELECT #{basYymm} AS BAS_YYMM , 'K40201' AS RSK_ELMT_C , TO_CHAR( ZZ.ENTY_ID , '9999999999') AS RNMCNO FROM ( SELECT /*+ FULL(A) PARALLEL(4) */ DISTINCT A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AS ENTY_ID FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD A , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_ADDN_IFMN C , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_RGSN_DTLS D WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = C.CLNT_ENTY_ID AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = D.CLNT_ENTY_ID
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM SID.IDO_A_UUA_ACNT B WHERE 1 = 1 AND (B.ACNT_STAS_TYPE_CODE IN ('AC', 'IN') -- 정상/통합계좌만 OR (B.ACNT_STAS_TYPE_CODE = 'CL' AND B.CLSG_DATE > #{tgtTrnEdt})) AND B.ACNT_TYPE_CODE IN ('GNAC', 'FPAC', 'FOAC', 'SVAC') -- 리테일계좌만 AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = B.ACNT_OWNR_ID ) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD B WHERE B.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND B.RGBR_CODE = '21220' /* 연금전략팀 */ AND B.CRFL_FLTG_RSLT_CODE NOT IN ('1','2','3') /* 요주의필터링결과코드 */ ) AND D.PRCE_DATE <= #{tgtTrnEdt} -- 고객등록일자 AND A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE IN ('H', 'M', 'L') -- 등급 존재
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 -- HTS약정 FROM SID.IDO_A_MAG_HTS_SVC H WHERE H.HTS_ID_CLNT_ENTY_ID = C.CLNT_ENTY_ID AND H.RGSN_DATE <= #{tgtTrnEdt} )
UNION
SELECT /*+ FULL(A) PARALLEL(4) */ DISTINCT A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AS ENTY_ID FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD A , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_ADDN_IFMN C , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_RGSN_DTLS D WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = C.CLNT_ENTY_ID AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = D.CLNT_ENTY_ID
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM SID.IDO_A_UUA_ACNT B WHERE 1 = 1 AND (B.ACNT_STAS_TYPE_CODE IN ('AC', 'IN') -- 정상/통합계좌만 OR (B.ACNT_STAS_TYPE_CODE = 'CL' AND B.CLSG_DATE > #{tgtTrnEdt})) AND B.ACNT_TYPE_CODE IN ('GNAC', 'FPAC', 'FOAC', 'SVAC') -- 리테일계좌만 AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = B.ACNT_OWNR_ID ) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD B WHERE B.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND B.RGBR_CODE = '21220' /* 연금전략팀 */ AND B.CRFL_FLTG_RSLT_CODE NOT IN ('1','2','3') /* 요주의필터링결과코드 */ )
AND D.PRCE_DATE <= #{tgtTrnEdt} -- 고객등록일자 AND A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE IN ('H', 'M', 'L') -- 등급 존재 AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM SID.IDO_A_MAG_ACNT_ADDN_SVC X , SID.IDO_A_UUA_ACNT Y WHERE X.ACNT_ADSR_SECT_CODE = '02' -- ARS약정 AND X.ACNT_ID = Y.ACNT_ID AND Y.ACNT_OWNR_ID = C.CLNT_ENTY_ID AND ((X.ACNT_SVC_RGSN_STAS_CODE = '1' -- 등록 AND X.RGSN_DATE <= #{tgtTrnEdt}) OR (X.ACNT_SVC_RGSN_STAS_CODE = '2' -- 해지 AND X.CNCN_DATE > #{tgtTrnEdt})) ) ) ZZ
